falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises by 15% above the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the pattern's historical behavior (bottom_2022_may_luna), invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volatility (14-day ATR) decreases by 30% from current levels
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp drop in volatility would indicate a lack of momentum, refuting the blowoff score's implication of imminent market pressure.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: An extreme surge in volume would signal a market shift (e.g., panic or breakout), directly contradicting the HOLD signal's expectation of stagnation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
